reference: Hi, my father has chronic kidney disease. His creatinine is eight point seven and urea is two hundred and forty. How dangerous can urea be? Doctors have advised dialysis twice a week. I am trying alternative medicine but am worried about urea being at two hundred and forty, so I want to know how dangerous it is. What can be the effects of it? Please help.
text: Hi, my father has chronic kidney disease. His creatinine is 8.7 and urea is 240. How dangerous can urea be? Doctors have advised dialysis twice a week. I am trying alternative medicine, but I'm worried about urea being at 240. So, I want to know how dangerous it is. What can be the effects of it? Please help.
